narrative:
Precinct Knox Township (precinct in Vinton County) has 396 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
